admission_overview.college_name: Dr. K.N. Modi University Course Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Dr. K.N. Modi University Modinagar admission 2025 is both merit and entrance-based for both undergraduate and postgraduate courses. Students can enrol by applying online at the official website of the university. The university accepts applicants based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. Dr. K.N. Modi University Modinagar, offers a variety of undergraduate and postgraduate courses in the fields of Engineering, Technology, Management, Nursing, and more. Additionally, students can also pursue diploma courses at the university.

eligibility_selection.title: Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Dr. K.N. Modi University Modinagar, course admission is subject to the preset admission criteria. Candidates looking to enrol in the UG courses offered at the university need to pass Class 12 from a recognised board. Similarly, PG admissions require students to complete their graduation. Students must fulfil both the admission criteria of the desired course. The table below showcases the eligibility and selection criteria for popular Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation in any Discipline with a minimum of 50% marks

admission_process.title: Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission procedure for Dr. K.N. Modi University Modinagar, includes several steps from application to selection, followed by admission confirmation. Candidates interested in joining the university can apply online for the desired course at the official website of the university. Students can first check whether they satisfy the admission criteria of the course they seek to join. Eligible students can follow the steps listed below to complete the Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested candidates can apply for the desired programme by visiting the official website of the university and filling out the application form. To submit the form, students must provide the required information and documents along with paying the application fees.
Step 2: Selection Process

Students are shortlisted based on their academic performance along with CAT /XAT/ MAT/ CMAT /RMAT scores for the MBA programme, and for the remaining courses, selection is done based on merit of last qualifying exam taken. The university may conduct further selection rounds, such as personal interviews, if it deems it necessary.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, selected students need to pay the admission fees to secure their spot at the university.

courses_data.name: Dr. K.N. Modi University, Modinagar BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Dr. K.N. Modi University provides BTech in Automobile, Civil, Computer Science, Electrical & Electronics, and Mechanical Engineering. The 4-year Regular BTech is based on class 12 with 50% marks for General category, 45% for OBC, and 40% for SC/ST/PH. The 3-year Lateral Entry BTech is based on a Diploma or B.Sc. with 50% marks. Merit or recognized entrance exams approved by the university are considered for selection.

faqs.question: What specialisations are available in BTech at Dr. K.N. Modi University?
faqs.answer: Dr. K.N. Modi University provides BTech in Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. Candidates can opt from these technical streams according to their career aspirations. Both four-year Regular and three-year Lateral Entry are provided.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech admission at Dr. K.N. Modi University?
faqs.answer: For Regular BTech in Dr. K.N. Modi University, candidates need to pass class 12 with 50% marks in General,  45% for OBC, and 40% in SC/ST/PH categories. For Lateral Entry, a Diploma or B.Sc. degree with a minimum of 50% marks is needed. The eligibility provides equal opportunities to students belonging to all categories.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for BTech at Dr. K.N. Modi University?
faqs.answer: The admission to BTech at Dr. K.N. Modi University is merit-based or through approved entrance tests by the university. For Regular BTech, performance in class 12 and entrance examinations is taken into account. For Lateral Entry, admission is granted solely on marks scored in the qualifying Diploma or B.Sc. exam.

admission_overview.college_name: IPEC Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility & Selection Process

paragraphs: IPEC admissionsare both merit and entrance-based for its undergraduate and postgraduate programmes.Inderprastha Engineering College (IPEC)offers BTech admissions based on the score obtained inJEE Main, while admissions in MTech programme are done on the basis of score obtained inGATEentrance exam. IPEC also offers UG degree in BBA and BCA. The programmes offered at IPEC are affiliated toAKTU.  Additionally, IPEC also offers direct admission to second year of BTech programme. All of the courses at Inderprastha Engineering are offered through regular mode.

IPEC course admissionto the UG and PG courses are based on course-specific entrance exams. Inderprastha Engineering College also offers lateral entry for second-year BTech programme. Inderprastha Engineering College (IPEC) feevaries depending on the programme and year of study selected by the student. The overall tuition fee of IPEC ranges between INR 2.5 lakh to INR 4.5 lakh. This doesn’t include the exam and hostel fee. Apart from the tuition fee, the students have to pay INR 7,500 for the exam fee (2 semesters) online on university’s website. Inderprastha Engineering College seatintake varies course-wise. Following the UPTAC counselling, candidates are offered seats based on merit obtained in the relevant entrance exams. Inderprastha Engineering College offers several specialisations in BTech course such as BTech in Computer Engineering, BTech in Information Technology, and more along with direct entry in second year of BTech (Lateral entry). IPEC also offers MTech programme. The seat intake for the courses provided at the college is as follows:

Inderprastha Engineering College reserves 15% of its total seat intake of each course for management quota. The vacant seats after the UPTAC counselling will be filled by the college as per the norms laid down UPSEE and State Government. The eligible students can contact the college officials for further details.

Inderprastha Engineering College admission processincludes several steps. Interested candidates can visit the official website of IPEC to obtain the application form. The entire application process is in online mode. The accepted entrance exam for admission in IPEC is JEE Mains for BTech and GATE for MTech. Below is the step-wise admission process of Inderprastha Engineering College:
Inderprastha Engineering College Application Process

Interested candidates who fulfill the specified eligibility can visit the official website of Inderprastha Engineering College (IPEC) to fill the application form online. The candidates need to select the desired course, pay the application fee and upload the specified documents to complete the registration.
Selection Process

Once the registration is done, the candidates will be shortlisted based on the marks obtained in the entrance exams for the respective courses they chose. The score of JEE Mains will be considered for BTech while scores obtained in GATE will be taken in account for admission in MTech programme in IPEC.
Counselling and Fee Payment

The shortlisted candidates will then be called in for UPTAC counselling based on which seats will be allotted. Once the seats have been allotted the students will have to pay the course fee and submit the required documents to complete the admission process. The required documents are as follows:

reviews.review_heading: A dynamic college experience back by strong academy and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-maintained classrooms, labs, and libraries with modern equipment. Wi-Fi access, clean hostel rooms, and regular maintenance contribute to a comfortable stay. However, occasional water or power issues may occur but are resolved promptly.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good CSE infrastructure, knowledgeable faculty, and an industry-ready curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is new and good, with a very big building for CSE. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the hostel. Good lab facilities and classrooms are average but decent. The library facilities are available, and the canteen food is good, but hostel mess food is of average quality. A sports ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: IPEC Engineering institution in Ghaziabad, is known for its strong placement record and faculty.
reviews.review_text: It's good in all these things the canteen is good, the sports facilities are very nice also with take care of medical facilities. Inderprastha Engineering College (IPEC) in Ghaziabad offers a range of infrastructure and hostel facilities for students. These include well-equipped labs, a central library, a sports complex, a cafeteria, and a Wi-Fi campus. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, with a significant number of beds available.

reviews.review_heading: I won't advise anyone to come here. It's a full-day college with a system of remedial classes.
reviews.review_text: AC fees are taken but all the ACs are not working. Hostel facilities are bad. The curfew is at 7:00 PM. The worst food is served at the canteen. Unhygienic conditions are there in the hostel canteen and no one listens. Coolers are there that are not maintained hence create problem in summers.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, placements, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good. There was a gym in the hostel as well. The food quality was also good and the taste was nice. Wi-Fi is there in the hostel. The library infrastructure was awesome. The library has many books. We could read them and the garden area was there for the fresh air. The cafeteria was also big and good.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are below average. Almost 60% of students get placed.
reviews.review_text: We have projectors in our class and a Wi-Fi facility as also. The library is also good, with both academic and non-academic. Washrooms are good. The hostel is good, but it is non-AC, and the food is below average. The hostel is strictly maintained by the warden. The campus is good.

reviews.review_heading: The Placement is average. Faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: We have projectors in our classes and a Wi-Fi facility also. The library is also good, with many books, both academic and non-academic.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, teachers, average placements, and a small campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at the college is good, with almost all the necessary equipment available in the Physics and Chemistry labs. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but the connection is unreliable in some classes and areas; for instance, my class experiences connectivity issues. The classrooms are equipped with projectors, and only the first-year classrooms have air conditioning. The ECE and AI/ML labs feature SMART boards, and there are several computer labs available, although a few of the computers ...

reviews.review_heading: I am a bit dissatisfied as the infrastructure could be better and placements are low.
reviews.review_text: It is Wi-Fi enabled but not in some places. The library is decent and big. Classrooms do have projectors but are used very rarely. The hostel is fine and the space for badminton is really nice. It has multiple courts for badminton. It has a decent and big ground on which we can play football and kababi. It also has a basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: In short, good for college life and degree purpose.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good but washrooms are not in good condition. The library does not have sufficient books for BBA and BCA students. They only have books for B.Tech students. They provide the worst medical facilities. They do not have medicine and a bed facility. The canteen food is not good for health.

reviews.review_heading: Good for events. The attached night pictures show the girls' hostel and the college entrance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good enough. The college is not as big as I expected. Wi-Fi is not available in the whole college, only available in some areas. Library does not have extra books than the course. College organizes Spardha, a sports day, every year. Canteen is clean.

reviews.review_heading: A solid choice for placement and focused engineering education in the NCR region.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is very good and tastes like home food. I suggest you consider the standard of our college as a minimum benchmark to choose a good college and have a good career. College is good, with well-maintained classrooms, decent lab facilities, and a functional library.

reviews.review_heading: Decent academics and placements, but needs improvement in infrastructure and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is average (2/5). It is located in an industrial area, and pollution from factories makes it hard to stay on campus, worsened by monsoon flooding at the entrance. Labs and the library are fine. Sports facilities include a basketball court, football ground, badminton courts, a billiard room, and a gym (for hostelers). Hostel rooms are decent with both private and shared options. The mess is hygienic but needs better food quality. Security is strict, especially for girls...

reviews.review_heading: I am disgusted and dissatisfied because of the faculty, principal, and director.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay, but not so good. Labs are average and cramped, and not all machines are working. There are Wi-Fi network issues, and the washrooms are too small. They don't even provide good drinking water. As for the faculty, everything is different for them, including the water and washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is nice with a good crowd and a nice campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good enough. Labs are good. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled and fully AC. It has medical rooms and sports activities. The hostel is also maintained with good food. Gym facilities are also available. Sports arena is accessible for the hostelers 24x7.
